heading: Exclusion of lands
label: 241d Exclusion of lands
text: The following area is excluded from the park: That portion of section 8 lying southwest of a line between the common corner of sections 8, 9, 16, and 17 and the northwest corner of the southwest quarter section 8; that portion of section 16 lying southwest of a line between the southeast corner southwest quarter and the northwest corner southwest quarter section 16; and section 17, township 147 north, range 100 west, fifth principal meridian, North Dakota.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , which comprises this subchapter.act Apr. 25, 1947, ch. 4161 Stat. 52
